advisories.detail: \tau_P [undefined] in prop:rollout-polynomial-identity — add a definitionv for the endpoint treatment contrast \tau_P=m_P(1)-m_P(0), or remove the new symbol from the lemma statement.

p^{\mathrm{eq}}(\beta,q) [undefined] in prop:equal-spacing-benchmark/prop:no-extrapolation-boundary — add a definitionv for the equal-spacing schedule p^{\mathrm{eq}} and reference it from both lemmas.

\Gamma_P(p) [undefined] in def:exact-nested-risk/oeq:exact-nested-minimax/lem:exact-risk-envelope-upper — add a definitionv for the design covariance matrix \Gamma_P(p) and reference it from the exact-risk statements.
rate-feasible [undefined] in oeq:exact-nested-minimax — add an anchored definition of rate-feasibility, or replace the predicate by the explicit bound it means.

monotone Bernoulli rollout [undefined] in oeq:exact-nested-minimax — add a definitionv for the monotone Bernoulli rollout law/rule, or replace the phrase with the already defined rollout law class \mathcal P_\beta.

admissible schedule [undefined] in ass:round-mean-variance-envelope — replace 'admissible schedule' with membership in S_{k,q} and cite Definition~\ref{obj:def:budgeted-schedule-class}, or add an anchored predicate definition.

\mathcal P_\beta [mismatch] in def:exact-nested-risk/thm:tv-envelope-design/oeq:exact-nested-minimax/lem:exact-risk-envelope-upper/lem:exact-chebyshev-rate — make the rollout law class notation carry its schedule/design/scale dependencies, or add an anchored convention that these ambient parameters are suppressed consistently.
